headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Veralto, Lowers Price Target to $102
summary: Citigroup  analyst Andrew Kaplowitz   maintains Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $104 to $102.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Veralto, Raises Price Target to $100
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Deane Dray   maintains Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $99 to $100.

headline: Veralto Corp (VLTO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Sales Growth and Strategic ...
summary: Veralto Corp (VLTO) reports a robust start to 2026 with 7% sales growth, strategic investments, and raised earnings guidance, despite facing market challenges.
